ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice - Action Required
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

We hope you are enjoying the benefits of our SaaS platform. This is a reminder that your subscription (Plan: Premium) is set to renew on 15th May 2026. To continue uninterrupted service, please confirm your renewal by 10th May.

Click the following link to review and renew your subscription:
<URL>

Thank you for choosing our services.

Sincerely,
The XYZ SaaS Team

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO Gift Card Request - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

I hope this message finds you well. As the CEO of XYZ Pvt Ltd, I urgently need your assistance to purchase a gift card worth INR 50,000 for a client. The transaction must be completed by 5:00 PM today to avoid any penalties.

Please click the link below to process the payment:
<URL>

Thank you for your swift response.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
XYZ Pvt Ltd
